title: Positive flow: Select a category and proceed to the next screen
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the category selection screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the category selection screen | Tap on the 'Cars' category option | Verify that the 'Cars' category is selected and proceed to the next screen
expected_result: The app navigates to the next screen with the 'Cars' category selected

title: Negative flow: Attempt to select a non-existent category
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the category selection screen
test_data: Attempt to select a non-existent category
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the category selection screen | Tap on a non-existent category option | Verify that an error message is displayed indicating the category does not exist
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating the category does not exist

title: Boundary validation: Select the first category
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the category selection screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the category selection screen | Tap on the first category option | Verify that the first category is selected

title: Toggle state: Expand and collapse a category
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the category selection screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the category selection screen | Tap on the 'Cars' category option | Verify that the 'Cars' category is expanded | Tap on the 'Cars' category option again | Verify that the 'Cars' category is collapsed
expected_result: The 'Cars' category toggles between expanded and collapsed states

title: Clickable buttons: Verify Android navigation buttons
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the category selection screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the category selection screen | Tap on the back button | Verify that the app navigates back to the previous screen | Tap on the home button | Verify that the app returns to the home screen | Tap on the recent apps button | Verify that the app opens the recent apps screen
expected_result: The Android navigation buttons function as expected

title: Accessibility: Verify accessibility features
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the category selection screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the category selection screen | Use voice commands to navigate to the category selection screen | Use screen reader to navigate to the category selection screen | Verify that all UI elements are accessible and can be interacted with
expected_result: All UI elements are accessible and can be interacted with

title: Usability: Verify navigation flow
preconditions: The app is open and the user is on the category selection screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the category selection screen | Navigate through all category options | Verify that the navigation flow is smooth and intuitive
expected_result: The navigation flow is smooth and intuitive
